title: Noooo way Images
wikitext:
[]: Noooo way!!! Images             Quote Post by Naz » Mon Nov 10, 2008 12:24 am Hey pals, long time reader, small time poster. I love the images in evangelion that when you link them together you can't believe someone made that connection. If you are wondering what I mean I am talking about images like those in http://evacommentary.org/appendix/recyclopedia.html Specifically the one where Misato grabs Shinji by the head just like sachiel does to unit-01, or the one where Rei and Shinji make the same pose in the hospital. I know that there are other images that have "shock value" like this, I remember specifically the one where the cross on the post in EoE looks like the elevator doors or the bridge bunnies look like the kids in the school when they plair air guitar and read manga. Is there another gallery of these repeat images or "shock value" images where when put next to each other make you go "WHOA!!!!!" Thanks in advance and sorry if there is already a post like this! PPS I made a connection of repeat imagery that I never saw anyone else make, so this is my contribution to these boards (I'm sure it's been noticed): In ep 11 with Matriel, Asuka kicks a door open to find Matriel staring her down. Later in that episode Asuka kicks a door open fairly similarly with Unit-02.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 10, 2008 1:47 am Those sorts of things used to get posted about regularly back in ANF's heyday. It was lots of fun trying to hunt down them all; the show oozes with parallelism and 'you never see anything just once'. Do keep in mind that NGE doesn't just do it using visuals alone, but with situations and dialogue as well. Here's a couple of archived threads to check out: - Devoted to the topic - First three pages here have some - Can always ignore the weird theorizing here A lot of Shin-seiki's old stuff points out examples left and right, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Rogue Eva Squirrel » Mon Nov 10, 2008 5:18 pm The way Shinji's looking at the blood on his hand in the recylopedia (episode one and episode whatever) is the same way he looks at the sperm on his hand in End of Evangelion.

[]: Re: Noooo way!!! Images             Quote Post by bioweapon680 » Mon Nov 10, 2008 9:31 pm Naz wrote: Hey pals, long time reader, small time poster. I love the images in evangelion that when you link them together you can't believe someone made that connection. If you are wondering what I mean I am talking about images like those in http://evacommentary.org/appendix/recyclopedia.html Specifically the one where Misato grabs Shinji by the head just like sachiel does to unit-01, or the one where Rei and Shinji make the same pose in the hospital. I know that there are other images that have "shock value" like this, I remember specifically the one where the cross on the post in EoE looks like the elevator doors or the bridge bunnies look like the kids in the school when they plair air guitar and read manga. Is there another gallery of these repeat images or "shock value" images where when put next to each other make you go "WHOA!!!!!" Thanks in advance and sorry if there is already a post like this! PPS I made a connection of repeat imagery that I never saw anyone else make, so this is my contribution to these boards (I'm sure it's been noticed): In ep 11 with Matriel, Asuka kicks a door open to find Matriel staring her down. Later in that episode Asuka kicks a door open fairly similarly with Unit-02.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Nov 10, 2008 9:42 pm Anno stated in an interview that he thought Japan was "a nation of children". What the "shock" imagery is is stuff like the bridge bunnies doing various things, then having another scene where it shows schoolchildren doing the same things as the bridge bunnies. The "shock" isn't what Americans would typically think of it is, its more of those, "you make the connection, and you sit bolt upright when you realize what he did there."

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 12, 2008 8:08 am Rogue Eva Squirrel wrote: The way Shinji's looking at the blood on his hand in the recylopedia (episode one and episode whatever) is the same way he looks at the sperm on his hand in End of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Rogue Eva Squirrel » Wed Nov 12, 2008 1:54 pm Reichu wrote: Rogue Eva Squirrel wrote: The way Shinji's looking at the blood on his hand in the recylopedia (episode one and episode whatever) is the same way he looks at the sperm on his hand in End of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Nov 12, 2008 4:57 pm Rogue Eva Squirrel wrote: Two posts in and I've already been Reichu'd!

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Sun Nov 16, 2008 6:38 am I don't have screencappage, but hopefully, the descriptions will suffice... * The shot of Rei looking down on Kaworu when she shows up in Terminal Dogma + * The shot of Asuka looking down on Shinji after he spills coffe on his shirt in EoE

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Mon Dec 01, 2008 11:54 pm Count A'ight wrote: I don't have screencappage, but hopefully, the descriptions will suffice... * The shot of Rei looking down on Kaworu when she shows up in Terminal Dogma + * The shot of Asuka looking down on Shinji after he spills coffee on his shirt in EoE

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 02, 2008 12:36 am Rei's expression isn't quite as harsh, although it's very subtle. Look at the tilt of her eyebrows, for one. Quick way to find the thread: Click on "Threads" above, then "Chit-Chat", then do a word search for "image request".

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Tue Dec 02, 2008 1:16 am Reichu wrote: Rei's expression isn't quite as harsh, although it's very subtle. Look at the tilt of her eyebrows, for one.

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Tue Dec 02, 2008 11:46 pm Jeez, was it necessary to make the images so big? A 512x384 and a 512x288 would have sufficed...

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Dec 03, 2008 3:32 pm Count A'ight wrote: Jezz, was it necessary to make the images so big? A 512x384 and a 512x288 would have sufficed...

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Wed Dec 03, 2008 7:09 pm Arigato. Here's something that could be seen as an example of overanalysis:

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Dec 03, 2008 8:56 pm Yeah, I think the concepts/implications are different. Note how Shinji's expression is changing, while it looks like Rei's duplication is intended to draw attention to her clone status.

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Wed Dec 10, 2008 8:37 am I miss the detail of the bigger pictures. Is there any way we can still access them?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Dec 10, 2008 3:22 pm System Shocker wrote: I miss the detail of the bigger pictures. Is there any way we can still access them?

[]:             Quote Post by Midori » Thu Dec 18, 2008 10:23 pm Oh, how I love people who sacrifice their time to do nifty little things like take a kabillion screenshots. I really enjoyed all those screenshots of Misato yelling the same thing at the same angle. You can't really blame them for recycling shots (refering to "because we're cheap"), I dont exactly think it's "easy" to animate a 26 episode series frame by frame in the early 90's.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Dec 19, 2008 4:57 pm Midori wrote: You can't really blame them for recycling shots (refering to "because we're cheap"), I dont exactly think it's "easy" to animate a 26 episode series frame by frame in the early 90's.
